purple_chat
Team Purple - FRIENDLY COMPETITION - Read Pinned Messages
Deleted User 21-May-19 10:46 PM
Welcome to Team Purple. During specific events over the summer, Team Purple will be competing with Team Blue to complete goals together, with the winning team receiving large VoCoin™ prizes after each event. After Phase V begins, each team will elect a leader, who will organize and direct teammate's efforts to best serve VoCo. Members of each team should use the time prior to Phase V to show their teammates why they should be chosen to lead. This activity is meant to improve the productivity of VoCo through fun, good-natured competitive spirit. No foul play or antagonistic commentary of either team is allowed.
Pinned a message.

Vagous 22-May-19 08:30 PM
So guys
I've come up with a new exploiting idea.
Let's try using cheat engine to change the value of our queue
It would be a lot easier than backdooring if it is a success.
devcat 22-May-19 08:34 PM
XD
I can't tell if you are joking
Queue pos is handled server side
Vagous 22-May-19 08:42 PM
Wow that was a really sick xd
Cheat engine is more than just your side of the screen.
It can effect online values too.
So it might work.
I can't do it right now because i'm on my school computer.
devcat 22-May-19 08:46 PM
IK, but that requires your client-side app being able to theoretically be able tomodify or influence it, even if it isn't built into the app. The server sends you your position, and thats it. There is no way that you can influence it or modify it from a external connection.
Vagous 22-May-19 08:57 PM
If someone gave me a gift, why couldn't I be able to mess with it however I wanted to?
devcat 22-May-19 08:57 PM
I'm trying to say you can't do that with cheat engine
Vagous 22-May-19 08:58 PM
Guess i'll find the value that's not displayed then.
Such as the server given value.
The one that you can't see.
devcat 22-May-19 08:58 PM
I think you are missing what I am trying to say
there is no value that relates to queue that you client sends or can modify on the server side
and the server side value is the one that actually affects when you get in
Vagous 22-May-19 09:00 PM
The server side value is what i'm talking about.
If it's the same as the displayed one, only delayed by about a few milliseconds, then it should be fairly easy to find.
devcat 22-May-19 09:02 PM
but you can't edit it
Vagous 22-May-19 09:15 PM
If it is displayed by cheat engine, I assure you, I CAN edit it.

so careful

klux1 🇩🇪 23-May-19 02:32 PM

Vagous 23-May-19 02:35 PM

Golden 14-Jun-19 09:10 AM
#VOTEGOLDEN
I'm here today to explain to you, my dear groupmates why you should choose me as your leader. 1) As you know I'm running a VCN/Dollar Shop. Which means, I have enough resources to supply everyone during events for no cost! 2) I'm quite active! Both in Discord and Minecraft. Meaning, I can always be by your side whenever you need any kind of guidance 3) I have the ability to listen to your ideas, suggestions and come up with the best solution/answer for anything like an event or some kind of problem we've got. 4) Most of you know me on decent level and know what kind of person I am. These are all, you should know of. I hope, if I get chosen, we make a huge difference on the server and really show the others the power of VoCo and Team Purple! G'days!
1

Elaphant 14-Jun-19 10:01 AM
1. Help - You ask for something you get it, whether it be assistance within the discord or items within game, I will be happy to assist and get you the items or help you need 2. Speed - Response time, pm me and get a response within 30 seconds, 90% of the time if my name on discord is green, this means I am able to respond to any challenge or other matter 3. Respect- I respect all members and will not treat anyone unfairly, everyone will be treated with the same respect. 4. Fun - I like to have fun and joke around with everyone meaning the environment I create will be fun and a safe, happy environment to be in 5. Events - I will be creative with events and try to cater for all ages and abilities, of course I will be handing out tons of free stuff at events such as kits Sponsored by Elaphants Emporium 6. Stash - the first thing I will do as leader is start up a stash where purple members can loot up and gear before events and if in need of items 7. Organised - I am very organised and able to show authority without being bossy, I will be able to host events with ease and encourage fun and a happy environment 8. Team purple kit I have made and duped a team purple kit ready to give to all!!!!!!!!! To conclude, I will be fun, energetic and useful for all, So dont be silly Vote Elaphant (edited)

It is time for the election: Today we will be voting for the leader of team purple for the start of Phase V. Our candidates are @Golden and @Elaphant. To vote for @Golden react to this message with an To vote for @Elaphant react to this message with a Voting will last for 12 hours and end at 5:30 UTC. Good luck to those who are running! Side note: Bribing someone to vote a certain way is prohibited (eg saying “I’ll give you 100 VoCoin to vote for me.” or things to that affect).
